description_long: This house features a traditional half-timbered design with exposed wooden beams and white plaster infill, reminiscent of medieval European architecture. The roof is steeply pitched and covered with reddish-orange clay tiles, giving it a rustic appearance. The structure includes a prominent stone chimney and a stone foundation, with brickwork visible at the base and around the lower walls. Windows are symmetrically arranged with wooden frames, and the main entryway is sheltered by a small overhang supported by wooden posts. An attached side structure with a flat, stone-tiled roof suggests a garage or storage area. The overall look is that of a historic, well-built residential home suitable for a quaint urban or village setting.
description: A half-timbered, two-story house with a steep clay-tiled roof, stone foundation, and symmetrical windows, featuring a side structure with a flat stone roof.
description_view_0: The side of the house shows the half-timbered wall, stone chimney, and part of the brick foundation, with the clay-tiled roof clearly visible.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the main entryway with an overhang, symmetrical windows, and the gable end of the roof.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the long side of the house, the flat-roofed side structure, and the extended stone foundation.
description_view_3: The opposite gable end is visible, showing more windows and the connection between the main house and the side structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small overhang, wooden posts, and steps leading up to a central door.
